modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Bloomberg Excel add-in not showing up in Excel.

full_description_text:  
I opened Excel today and noticed that the Bloomberg Excel add-in is missing. I really need it for my work in the Beacom Finance Lab. It's just not there when I look for it, and I'm not sure why.
short_description: Bloomberg Excel add-in not showing up in Excel.
description: I opened Excel today and noticed that the Bloomberg Excel add-in is missing. I really need it for my work in the Beacom Finance Lab. It's just not there when I look for it, and I'm not sure why.
